# Prabish Khanal

> Frontend Engineer crafting high-performance web applications.

## About Me

I am an experienced Frontend Engineer with over 5 years of professional experience building scalable, performant, and accessible web applications. I specialize in the modern JavaScript ecosystem, primarily working with Angular, React, Next.js, and Node.js. Based in Kathmandu, Nepal.

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3/Sass
- **Frameworks & Libraries:** React.js, Next.js, Angular, Node.js, Express, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Architecture & Ecosystem:** Redux, RxJS, REST APIs, GraphQL, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG)
- **Tools & Platforms:** Git, GitHub, Docker, Vercel, Firebase, AWS

## Professional Philosophy

I focus on writing clean, modular, and maintainable code. My goal is to build user interfaces that are not just visually appealing but also highly performant and accessible to all users. I have a strong background in optimizing web performance (Core Web Vitals) and ensuring a top-tier developer experience within teams.

## Contact & Links

- **Website:** https://prabishkhanal.com.np
- **Location:** Kathmandu, Nepal
- **Role:** Frontend Engineer / Software Developer
